title: Adversarial moderation story using future labels
prompt: A proposed story says a platform routes every post that will later prove harmful to review, using a model whose only decision is a score threshold chosen from historical score distributions. True labels arrive after moderation. Diagnose the inconsistency and produce a faithful alternative framing.

model_specification.mechanism: A threshold partitions scores; errors remain because score distributions overlap.

prohibited_inferences: Future labels are available at moderation time
